Controlling Planets
The planets ruling the signs of Rahu and Ketu are called the
COntroling planets. Since Ketu is the inlet point of Karma, the planet
ruling the si9n of Ketu is called the past life Karmic Control. The planet
rulilg the sign of R.ahu controls the Karmic Distribution Control. The
controlling planets have strong implications depending upon where they
